memory.what_this_project_is: A localized, trust-centric digital social enterprise resurrecting traditional rotating savings club structures (ROSCA / Pardner associations). A transparent, digital-only alternative to credit markets.

how_it_works.pot_split: £10 → rotating weekly pot | £2 → admin + charity margin
how_it_works.weekly_payout: One member takes full £50 lump-sum hand in pre-shuffled cycle
how_it_works.compliance: No cash — all transfers digital-only, backed by written group agreements

assets_built.implementation_guide: ROSCA Social Enterprise Complete Implementation Guide — Master PDF blueprint (Dec 17, 2025)

tracking_toolkit.first_circle_table: Join order, Member IDs (format: INITIALS-WEEK-MONTH-YEAR), rotating hand dates, payment drop-downs

marketing_templates: Formal onboarding agreements (Pardner Scheme Pilot Group Agreement)

next_actions: Launch pilot group using existing toolkit
Use WhatsApp templates to recruit first 5 members
Track first rotation using First-Circle Tracking Table
Consider packaging implementation guide as a sellable product
